report.summary: Created 12 OG images for high-priority tool pages missing social cards, audited 5 interactive components for UX issues, and implemented accessibility + mobile UX fixes in OptionsPayoffCalculator and BitcoinLSTYieldEstimator.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: OptionsPayoffCalculator: Added role='region' and aria-label to container for screen reader context
OptionsPayoffCalculator: Added SVG chart accessibility — role='img', aria-labelledby, desc element with dynamic position details
OptionsPayoffCalculator: Added aria-pressed and aria-label to Call/Put and Buy/Sell toggle buttons
OptionsPayoffCalculator: Increased button minHeight to 44px for mobile touch targets
OptionsPayoffCalculator: Added invisible 20px touch target circle around 5px spot marker on chart
OptionsPayoffCalculator: Added width:100% and box-sizing:border-box to prevent overflow on mobile
BitcoinLSTYieldEstimator: Replaced custom div checkbox with native <input type='checkbox'> for screen reader and keyboard accessibility
BitcoinLSTYieldEstimator: Increased checkbox visual size from 16px to 20px for better touch targeting
BitcoinLSTYieldEstimator: Wrapped yield layer rows in <label> elements for proper form association
BitcoinLSTYieldEstimator: Added role='region' and aria-label to component container
BitcoinLSTYieldEstimator: Added aria-pressed and aria-label to quick select BTC amount buttons
BitcoinLSTYieldEstimator: Increased quick select button padding from 6px/10px to 8px/12px with minHeight:36px
BitcoinLSTYieldEstimator: Added aria-live='polite' and aria-atomic='true' to results section for dynamic updates

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Carry-Over)
items: HIGH: BabylonYieldEstimator — negative BTC/BABY price inputs accepted without validation
HIGH: Hip3FundingCalculator — no max bound on collateral input, funding rate override allows empty string
MEDIUM: All calculator components — range sliders lack visible real-time value feedback during drag
MEDIUM: OptionsPayoffCalculator — strike/breakeven labels may overlap on mobile due to fixed SVG padding
LOW: Multiple components missing prefers-reduced-motion media query respect for animations

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: correlation-matrix (1200x630) — matrix grid pattern with colored cells
OG image: funding-rates (1200x630) — chart with positive/negative rate bars
OG image: bridge-aggregator (1200x630) — network nodes connected by flow lines
OG image: dex-screener (1200x630) — candlestick chart elements
OG image: ai-trading-signals (1200x630) — neural network node visualization
OG image: airdrop-tracker (1200x630) — parachute/token drop design
OG image: backtesting-engine (1200x630) — timeline with performance curve
OG image: crypto-calendar (1200x630) — calendar grid with event markers
OG image: defi-position-manager (1200x630) — dashboard cards with protocol icons
OG image: smart-money-tracker (1200x630) — wallet network flow diagram
OG image: exchange-fees (1200x630) — bar chart comparing exchange fees
OG image: volatility-scanner (1200x630) — waveform oscillation pattern

sections.title: Coverage Gap
items: 30+ learn pages still missing OG images (e.g., bitcoin-layer-2, celestia-guide, berachain-guide)
30+ tool pages still missing OG images (e.g., governance-tracker, tax-calculator, robo-advisor)
Priority for next cycle: tool pages with highest expected traffic (tax-calculator, screener, dca-calculator)
